mapper.select: SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY score DESC ) AS `rank`, name, score, id FROM ( SELECT t.`name` AS name, t.id, SUM( CASE WHEN (t.id = m.teama AND ms.teama_score > ms.teamb_score) OR (t.id = m.teamb AND ms.teamb_score > ms.teama_score) THEN 2 ELSE 1 END ) AS score FROM team t JOIN `match` m ON (t.id = m.teama OR t.id = m.teamb) JOIN `event` e ON m.event_id=e.id JOIN matchscore ms ON m.id = ms.match_id WHERE e.id=#{eventId} GROUP BY t.id, t.name ) AS score ORDER BY score DESC;

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN (t.id = m.teama AND ms.teama_score > ms.teamb_score) OR (t.id = m.teamb AND ms.teamb_score > ms.teama_score) THEN 2 ELSE 1 END ) AS score FROM team t JOIN `match` m ON (t.id = m.teama OR t.id = m.teamb) JOIN `event` e ON m.event_id=e.id JOIN matchscore ms ON m.id = ms.match_id WHERE e.id=#{eventId} AND t.id=#{teamId} GROUP BY t.id;
